title: M&T Bank Expands Community Investment with New $25 Million 'Amplify Fund'
text: First significant philanthropic effort by M&T Bank across the former People's United footprint BUFFALO, N.Y., May 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Following the completion of its merger with People's United Financial Inc. (People's United) in April, M&T Bank Corporation (NYSE: MTB) ("M&T") today launched the Amplify Fund – a new $25 million philanthropic investment to provide further support in the legacy People's United communities throughout Connecticut, the larger New England market and New York.

title: 5 BofA Securities Top Value Stock Picks Also Pay Large and Dependable Dividends

title: M&T Bank Names Grace Lee Eastern Massachusetts Regional President and Group Lead of New England Government Banking
text: BOSTON , May 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Grace Lee has been named Eastern Massachusetts Regional President and Group Lead of New England Government Banking at M&T Bank. In her new role, she will ensure collaboration across all lines of business, and direct community banking activities that advance the bank's localized focus to provide more value for customers, businesses and communities across the region.
